task: tripartite graph-based recommendation (e.g., user groups and item bundles)
input: tripartite graph (users, items, and auxiliary nodes like groups/bundles)
output: ranked list of recommended objects (e.g., bundles or groups) for a user
backbone: graph convolutional network (GCN) with infinite layers via limit theory
loss: multi-objective optimization including Contrastive Divergence (CD) loss and pairwise ranking loss
key_idea: use consistency and discrepancy meta-path metrics as positive and contrastive signals in contrastive learning to capture high-order similarities for cold-start scenarios
